message:
test(unit): expand recording.rs (30→62) inline tests (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Cover serde round-trips for all recorder enums (FrameType, RecorderEventSource,
RecorderTextEncoding, RecorderRedactionLevel, RecorderIngressKind, RecorderSegmentKind,
RecorderControlMarkerType, RecorderLifecyclePhase), struct serde (RecorderEventCausality,
RecorderEventPayload all 4 variants, RecorderEvent), parse_recorder_event_json
(valid/invalid/wrong version), captured_kind_to_segment, GlobalSequence/IngressSequence
defaults, RecordingOptions defaults, EgressTap, IngressOutcome variants, action mappings,
recorder event recording, redact_detection, and schema version constant.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
